test_run_summary.note: 27 task tests + 5 peer-review tests = 32 new. Full `make test` additionally shows 9 pre-existing test_wire_shapes.py fails (Plan 01 DEV-01-WIRE-FIXTURES), excluded from baseline via --ignore; not introduced by this plan.

deviations.reason: nautilus-trader>=1.227 requires Python 3.12+; PEP508 marker gates it so base stays 3.11-installable (requires-python unchanged), dev/CI pinned to 3.13. Split make gates: verify (base) + verify-nt (NT). tech-stack.md updated. No red line touched. team-lead APPROVE.

ps supertrend couples to ps shared/ (must not depend on at runtime); integration uses a self-contained SuperTrend-shaped NT Strategy fixture (tests/fixtures/minimal_supertrend_strategy.py). Exposed + fixed a real defect: inspect.getmodule returns None for importlib-loaded classes, blocking the create_strategy factory path -> loader registers module in sys.modules, host resolves via sys.modules.get(cls.__module__). Contract test name preserved. team-lead APPROVE.
SandboxExecutionClientConfig accepts enums at construction but node.build() requires enum-name strings; fixed to pass 'MARGIN'/'CASH'/'NETTING'. Found via offline node.build().

Real NT dispose() stops the loop it doesn't own when run_async is stubbed; integration test asserts real assembly + strategy registration and tears down via cancel+drain. host.stop() graceful path covered by fake-node unit tests.
